meaning: n.男子气,生殖力,男子特点,刚强有力
examples: Research, he says, indicates they may actually increase virility.
The simplest starts by the oath giver saying, "I swear by my virility."
He remembered reading somewhere, though, that baldness shows virility..
Each conformed themselves to the image of virility and power appropriate to the time and place.
Politicians are obsessed with assembly plants, which some see as a symbol of national virility.
